column8: MSVC CRT _mbtowc_nolock @ 0x00450a00 calls MultiByteToWideChar; port links MinGW CRT - no source-port equivalent in td5mod
MSVC CRT _isspace @ 0x00450ac9 uses _pctype/__isctype; port links MinGW CRT - no source-port equivalent
MSVC CRT __allshl @ 0x00450b00 (64-bit shift-left helper); port links MinGW CRT which provides its own __ashldi3/_allshl
MSVC CRT _ungetc_nolock @ 0x00450b1f operates on MSVC FILE struct (_flag/_base/_ptr/_cnt); port links MinGW CRT with different FILE layout
MSVC CRT __retval_zero @ 0x00450b8d trivial stub returning 0 (xor eax,eax; ret); no port equivalent needed
